description: The lead said 'may be a symbol-or-character cohort candidate' for the Toy subtype. It already IS one. dsk-toy-horror has existed since wave 59 with three members. The actual missing wire: Living Phone DSK-20, an already-enriched corpus card whose own trivia states verbatim it belongs to the DSK Toy creature subtype, was sitting unpointered to the node it canonically belongs in. Orphan-edge completion. Fourth member, fourth distinct object-archetype (corrupted-household-appliance), and it makes the within-cohort artist anchor a Domenico Cava trio rather than a pair. Patched Plaything and Attack-in-the-Box were already wired; nothing to do there. Bear Trap and Conductive Machete belong to the OPPOSING survivor-tools cohort, not Toy. Orphans of the Wheat is Creature-Human per its own type_line trivia, not Toy, despite the 'toys' wordplay in its flavor text. One real wire this wave.
citations: [Living Phone DSK-20 trivia: 'Living Phone belongs to the Toy creature subtype introduced in Duskmourn']
[Draftsim: All 14 Toy Creatures in Magic Ranked]
[Scryfall: artist field — Domenico Cava on DSK-20, DSK-24, DSK-242]
edges_added: 20-living-phone -> dsk-toy-horror (characters frontmatter pointer + appears_on + body member-bullet)
other_candidates_considered: Bear Trap DSK-243 + Conductive Machete DSK-244 -> a dsk-survival-archetype / survivor-tools cohort. The dsk-survival-archetype character node exists and Conductive Machete already points at it; Bear Trap does not yet. Bear Trap is an artifact removal spell, not an Equipment/creature, so its fit to a 'survivor wields improvised weapon' character cohort is weaker than Conductive Machete's. Staged, not drawn this wave.
Patchwork Beastie / Patched Plaything 1:1 'stitched-construct' mirror — redundant once both already stack on dsk-toy-horror. Correctly not drawn; the cohort node already carries the connection.
next_pass_suggestions: Evaluate Bear Trap DSK-243 against the dsk-survival-archetype cohort node — verify whether a non-creature non-Equipment artifact (the trap as removal spell) meets that cohort's membership predicate before wiring.
Scryfall sweep s:dsk t:toy to enumerate the full ~14-card Toy roster and flag any other in-corpus Toy-subtyped cards still unwired (the node caveat already requests this).
